explainer: Riku Doldo III was Dressrosa's rightful king before Doflamingo framed and overthrew him.

question: At the Corrida Colosseum, the fruit that was up as the prize was ultimately claimed not by Luffy but by his long-lost sworn brother. Who took it?
explainer: Sabo, Luffy's sworn brother, won and ate the Mera Mera no Mi in Luffy's place.

question: When Sabo is revealed alive in Dressrosa, he holds a very high rank within the Revolutionary Army. What position does he occupy?
explainer: Sabo serves as the Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army, second only to Dragon.

question: A green-haired Colosseum contestant is such an obsessive Luffy fanboy that he weeps at meeting him. Which barrier-wielding pirate is this?
explainer: Bartolomeo, a devoted Straw Hat fanboy, fights with unbreakable barriers in the Colosseum.

question: A vain, handsome pirate prince in the Colosseum harbors a murderous split personality named Hakuba that emerges when he sleeps. Who is this dandy swordsman?
explainer: Cavendish's murderous sleeping alter-ego is the lightning-fast slasher called Hakuba.

question: Which flamboyant Doflamingo officer hosts the Corrida Colosseum tournament and was the one who gunned down Rebecca's mother, Scarlett?
explainer: Diamante hosts the Colosseum and had killed Scarlett, Rebecca's mother, years earlier.

question: One of Doflamingo's top officers is a hulking, stone-wielding giant with a comically high, squeaky voice. Zoro faces him. Who is he?
explainer: Pica, whose booming body contrasts a squeaky voice, is defeated by Zoro in Dressrosa.

question: The oldest and most senior of Doflamingo's officers, covered in green mucus, mentored Doflamingo as a boy. What is his name?
explainer: Trebol, the mucus-covered senior officer, helped raise the young Doflamingo.

question: The Doflamingo officer who fights Franky wears a baby costume and can dive through solid ground as if swimming. What is his name?
explainer: Señor Pink, who dresses as a baby, can swim through the ground and battles Franky.

question: One of Doflamingo's officers is physically incapable of refusing anyone who asks for her help, and later becomes engaged to Sai. Who is she?
explainer: Baby 5 cannot refuse anyone who needs her, and she ends up engaged to Sai.

question: Which pirate who once mocked and beat down Luffy back in Jaya returns in Dressrosa as a fanatical admirer of Doflamingo?
explainer: Bellamy, who humiliated Luffy in Jaya, returns as a devoted follower of Doflamingo.

question: A newly appointed Marine admiral who is blind and settles decisions with a roll of dice arrives to confront Doflamingo. What is his epithet?
explainer: Admiral Fujitora, the blind swordsman who relies on dice, comes to Dressrosa.

question: Which retired former Fleet Admiral accompanies Vice Admiral Tsuru to Dressrosa in the aftermath of Doflamingo's fall?
explainer: The retired former Fleet Admiral Sengoku travels to Dressrosa alongside Tsuru.

question: The leader of the Tontatta warriors who allies with the Straw Hats, wielding a needle-and-thread power, is a dwarf named what?
explainer: Leo commands the Tontatta warriors and fights with a stitching Devil Fruit power.

question: The princess of the Tontatta Tribe possesses tears that can heal any wound, which Doflamingo exploits. What is her name?
explainer: Mansherry, the Tontatta princess, can heal any injury with her tears.

question: A former legendary pirate competing in the Colosseum once had a pointed drill-like head, until Vice Admiral Garp dented it with a single punch. Who is he?
explainer: Chinjao's once drill-shaped head was famously dented by a punch from Garp.

question: The 13th chief of the Happo Navy and grandson of Chinjao ends up engaged to Baby 5 during the Dressrosa upheaval. What is his name?
explainer: Sai, the Happo Navy's 13th chief and Chinjao's grandson, becomes engaged to Baby 5.

question: A Colosseum king can unleash a devastating 'King Punch' capable of leveling an army, though it takes a full hour to charge. Who is this ruler?
explainer: King Elizabello II of Prodence can charge a single army-destroying King Punch every hour.

question: A giant mercenary in the Colosseum dreams of one day becoming king of the giants' homeland, Elbaf. What is his name?
explainer: Hajrudin is a giant mercenary who aspires to become the king of Elbaf.

question: The cheerful Revolutionary who trains Sabo and teaches Fish-Man Karate was once a child slave rescued by the Sun Pirates. Who is she?
explainer: Koala, a Revolutionary and former slave freed by the Sun Pirates, trains Sabo.

question: The Blackbeard Pirates' burly helmsman infiltrates the Corrida Colosseum under the alias 'the Champion' to seize the Mera Mera no Mi. Who is he?
explainer: Jesus Burgess of the Blackbeard Pirates entered the Colosseum as 'the Champion'.

question: A lion-like member of the Big Mom Pirates arrives on Fish-Man Island to collect its monthly candy tribute. What is his name?
explainer: Pekoms, a lion-like Big Mom Pirate, comes to Fish-Man Island for the candy tribute.

question: Accompanying Pekoms to Fish-Man Island is an egg-themed retainer of the Big Mom Pirates. What is his name?
explainer: Tamago, an egg-themed retainer of Big Mom, accompanies Pekoms to Fish-Man Island.

question: Back at Sabaody after the timeskip, a con man had assembled a crew of impostors while posing as Luffy himself. Who was this fake Straw Hat captain?
explainer: Demaro Black impersonated Luffy and led a gang of fake Straw Hats at Sabaody.

question: To descend safely toward Fish-Man Island, Luffy befriends and tames an enormous kraken living in the deep. What did he name it?
explainer: Luffy tamed the giant kraken Surume during the descent to Fish-Man Island.

question: During the two-year timeskip, Luffy trained on the uninhabited island of Rusukaina under the tutelage of which former pirate?
explainer: Silvers Rayleigh trained Luffy for two years on the island of Rusukaina.

question: One of the Wano samurai in Dressrosa can bring his ink brush drawings to life, once sketching a bird for the group to fly on. Who is he?
explainer: Kanjuro, a Wano samurai, can animate anything he draws with his ink brush.

question: Which spiky-haired Doflamingo officer can make anything he touches swell up and violently rupture like a bomb?
explainer: Gladius can cause objects he touches to swell and explode.

question: Doflamingo's terrifying power to spin out razor-sharp strings, control puppets, and even fly comes from which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Doflamingo's Ito Ito no Mi lets him generate and control razor-sharp strings.

question: Caesar Clown can become intangible and manipulate deadly gases because he ate which Logia-type Devil Fruit?
explainer: Caesar's Gasu Gasu no Mi lets him become and control gas.

question: Monet, who guards Caesar's lab as a snow-woman, wields which Logia Devil Fruit?
explainer: Monet ate the Yuki Yuki no Mi, giving her command over snow.

question: The senior Doflamingo officer Trebol produces and controls a huge volume of sticky mucus thanks to which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Trebol's Beta Beta no Mi lets him produce and manipulate sticky mucus.

question: Pica can merge his body with and control the stone of an entire city because of which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Pica's Ishi Ishi no Mi lets him assimilate into and control stone.

question: Diamante can make solid objects flutter and flap like thin cloth or flags. Which Devil Fruit grants this?
explainer: Diamante's Hira Hira no Mi lets him make things flutter like flags.

question: Bartolomeo's ability to conjure invisible, unbreakable walls comes from which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Bartolomeo's Bari Bari no Mi lets him create unbreakable barriers.

question: Baby 5 can transform her limbs and body into any kind of weapon, from swords to cannons. Which Devil Fruit is this?
explainer: Baby 5's Buki Buki no Mi lets her turn her body parts into weapons.

question: Buffalo can spin his limbs and body like a propeller to fly and attack. Which Devil Fruit gives him this?
explainer: Buffalo's Guru Guru no Mi lets him spin his body parts like propellers.

question: Señor Pink appears to swim through solid ground and walls as though it were water. Which Devil Fruit is responsible?
explainer: Señor Pink's Sui Sui no Mi lets him swim through solid surfaces.

question: The Doflamingo officer Machvise can crush enemies by increasing his own body weight up to ten thousand tons. Which Devil Fruit is this?
explainer: Machvise's Ton Ton no Mi lets him drastically increase his own weight.

question: The Tontatta princess Mansherry can heal any wound with her tears thanks to which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Mansherry's Chiyu Chiyu no Mi grants healing powers through her tears.

question: Corazon, the Marine who saved young Law, could mute all sound within a space using which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Corazon's Nagi Nagi no Mi let him create zones of total silence.

question: The pirate Caribou, encountered near Sabaody, can turn into a swamp and swallow people into his body. Which Devil Fruit gives him this?
explainer: Caribou's Numa Numa no Mi turns his body into a bottomless swamp.

question: The Wano samurai Kin'emon can instantly create clothing and disguises out of almost anything using which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Kin'emon's Fuku Fuku no Mi lets him create clothing and disguises from anything.

question: The Doflamingo artist Jora can warp people and objects into bizarre abstract art. Which Devil Fruit does she wield?
explainer: Jora's Ato Ato no Mi lets her transform things into abstract artwork.

question: The Tontatta leader Leo can stitch objects, wounds, and even people together with needle and thread. Which Devil Fruit is this?
explainer: Leo's Nui Nui no Mi lets him stitch things and people together.

question: Princess Viola's clairvoyant sight, letting her see through anything and read minds, comes from which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Viola's Giro Giro no Mi grants clairvoyance and the ability to read minds.

question: Gladius's power to make things swell and burst is granted by which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Gladius's Pamu Pamu no Mi lets him rupture and explode objects he touches.

question: The Mera Mera no Mi, the coveted prize of the Corrida Colosseum, grants its eater control over which element?
explainer: The Mera Mera no Mi is a Logia that grants control over fire.

question: Hody Jones leads a crew that seeks to overthrow King Neptune and wage war on humanity. What is this crew called?
explainer: Hody Jones commands the New Fish-Man Pirates, who aim to overthrow Neptune.

question: Which pirate crew, founded by Fisher Tiger, was devoted to freeing enslaved fish-men and merfolk?
explainer: Fisher Tiger founded the Sun Pirates to liberate enslaved fish-men.

question: Vander Decken IX and the giant Wadatsumi belong to which pirate crew?
explainer: Vander Decken IX captains the Flying Pirates, which include Wadatsumi.

question: Doflamingo's pirate crew and criminal organization, whose members serve as officers in Dressrosa, is known as what?
explainer: The Donquixote Pirates are Doflamingo's crew and criminal organization.

question: Doflamingo's officers in Dressrosa are organized under his three highest-ranking supreme officers into how many separate armies?
explainer: The Donquixote Family is split into three armies led by Trebol, Pica, and Diamante.

question: The famous gladiator arena in Dressrosa where fighters battled for the Mera Mera no Mi is called what?
explainer: The Corrida Colosseum is the Dressrosa arena where the Mera Mera no Mi was the prize.

question: At the end of the Dressrosa arc, a grand alliance of crews pledges loyalty to Luffy. What is this alliance named?
explainer: The Straw Hat Grand Fleet is the alliance of crews formed at the end of Dressrosa.

question: How many pirate crews pledged themselves to Luffy to form the Straw Hat Grand Fleet?
explainer: Seven crews united under Luffy to create the Straw Hat Grand Fleet.

question: Bartolomeo captains which crew that joins the Straw Hat Grand Fleet?
explainer: Bartolomeo leads the Barto Club, one of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet crews.

question: The vain swordsman Cavendish leads which pirate crew that joins the Straw Hat Grand Fleet?
explainer: Cavendish captains the Beautiful Pirates within the Straw Hat Grand Fleet.

question: The fleet led by Sai and inherited from the Chinjao Family that joins Luffy's alliance is called what?
explainer: Sai leads the Happo Navy, part of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet.

question: The tribe of tiny warriors living on Green Bit who secretly aid the Straw Hats against Doflamingo are known as what?
explainer: The dwarf Tontatta Tribe of Green Bit helps the Straw Hats topple Doflamingo.

question: Smoker commands a notoriously lawless and brutal Marine branch operating in the New World. Which unit is it?
explainer: Smoker leads the infamously ruthless G-5 Marine branch.

question: Sabo serves as a high officer of the organization led by Luffy's father, Monkey D. Dragon. What is it called?
explainer: Sabo is Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army, led by Monkey D. Dragon.

question: Fish-Man Island rests under the protection of which Emperor's crew, paid for with a monthly tribute of sweets?
explainer: The Big Mom Pirates protect Fish-Man Island in exchange for candy tribute.

question: The scheming pirate Caribou and his brother Coribou lead which crew encountered near Sabaody?
explainer: Caribou and his brother Coribou lead the Caribou Pirates.

question: The military force that defends the Ryugu Kingdom under King Neptune is known as what?
explainer: The Neptune Army is the military force of the Ryugu Kingdom.

question: At the time of the Punk Hazard and Dressrosa events, both Trafalgar Law and Doflamingo held which World Government title?
explainer: Both Law and Doflamingo were members of the Seven Warlords of the Sea.

question: Jesus Burgess, who infiltrated the Corrida Colosseum, is the helmsman of which Emperor-aspirant's crew?
explainer: Jesus Burgess is the helmsman of the Blackbeard Pirates.

question: The adventurer Orlumbus brings his massive fleet into Luffy's new alliance. What is his fleet called?
explainer: Orlumbus commands the Yonta Maria Grand Fleet within the Straw Hat Grand Fleet.

question: The Straw Hats reunited at Sabaody Archipelago to resume their voyage after being separated for how long?
explainer: The crew spent two years training separately before reuniting at Sabaody.

question: The New Fish-Man Pirates gained a surge of power by abusing a dangerous drug that traded lifespan for strength. What was it called?
explainer: Hody's crew took Energy Steroids, gaining power at the cost of their lifespans.

question: Queen Otohime devoted her life to a petition campaign urging the fish-men to do what?
correct_answer: Move to live on the surface among humans
incorrect_answers: Declare war on the World Government
Sever ties with the Sun Pirates
options: Declare war on the World Government
Move to live on the surface among humans
Sever ties with the Sun Pirates
explainer: Otohime campaigned for fish-men to relocate to the surface and coexist with humans.

question: Over a Den Den Mushi, Luffy brazenly declared to the Emperor Big Mom that he would do what regarding Fish-Man Island?
correct_answer: Defeat her and take Fish-Man Island under his protection
incorrect_answers: Pay double the candy tribute forever
Hand over the Straw Hats' treasure
options: Pay double the candy tribute forever
Defeat her and take Fish-Man Island under his protection
Hand over the Straw Hats' treasure
explainer: Luffy told Big Mom he would defeat her and take Fish-Man Island under his protection.

question: The Luffy-Law alliance formed on Punk Hazard set its sights on toppling which of the Four Emperors?
explainer: The alliance between Luffy and Law was formed to take down the Emperor Kaido.

question: On Punk Hazard, Caesar secretly mass-produced a substance essential to manufacturing artificial Zoan SMILE fruits. What is it called?
explainer: Caesar produced SAD, the substance needed to create SMILE artificial Devil Fruits.

question: When Law scrambled the Straw Hats' bodies with his 'Shambles' on Punk Hazard, which crewmate ended up stuck inside Nami's body?
explainer: Law's Shambles swapped the crew's souls, leaving Sanji trapped in Nami's body.

question: The lethal petrifying gas that Caesar unleashes on Punk Hazard, released when his slime pet Smiley dies, is named what?
explainer: Shinokuni is the deadly gas cloud released when Smiley dies, killing all it touches.

question: The Tontatta dwarves and their allies gave a codename to their secret plan to liberate Dressrosa from Doflamingo. What was it?
explainer: The plan to free Dressrosa from Doflamingo was codenamed Operation SOP.

question: To lure his enemies into a trap during the Dressrosa conflict, Doflamingo faked what to the world?
incorrect_answers: His own death in the Colosseum
options: His own death in the Colosseum
explainer: Doflamingo faked resigning from the Warlords while secretly retaining the title.

question: In his final gambit, Doflamingo sealed off all of Dressrosa within a shrinking cage of strings. What is this technique called?
explainer: Doflamingo's Birdcage trapped all of Dressrosa inside a closing cage of strings.

question: During his climactic duel with Doflamingo, Luffy debuted a powerful new form he had never used before. What was it?
explainer: Luffy first unveiled Gear Fourth during his final battle against Doflamingo.

question: Which massive Gear Fourth attack did Luffy use to finally strike down Doflamingo and break the Birdcage?
explainer: Luffy's King Kong Gun defeated Doflamingo at the climax of the Dressrosa battle.

question: Admiral Fujitora is famous for leaving major decisions up to chance in what unusual way?
explainer: Fujitora, being blind, famously decides many matters by rolling dice.

question: A stunning revelation during the Dressrosa arc reunited Luffy with a sworn brother he had believed dead for years. Who was it?
explainer: Dressrosa revealed that Luffy's sworn brother Sabo was alive as a Revolutionary.

question: How long before the Straw Hats' arrival did Doflamingo stage his coup and seize the throne of Dressrosa?
explainer: Doflamingo seized Dressrosa's throne roughly ten years before the Straw Hats arrived.

question: How did Doflamingo turn Dressrosa's people against their rightful King Riku?
correct_answer: He puppeteered Riku and his soldiers into robbing the citizens
incorrect_answers: He poisoned the royal water supply
He faked an invasion by the Marines
He bribed the royal council to rebel
options: He puppeteered Riku and his soldiers into robbing the citizens
He poisoned the royal water supply
He faked an invasion by the Marines
He bribed the royal council to rebel
explainer: Doflamingo used his strings to force King Riku and his soldiers to rob their own people.

question: After the battle for Dressrosa, Admiral Fujitora surprised his fellow Marines by deciding to do what about Luffy and Law?
explainer: Fujitora chose to let Luffy and Law escape rather than arrest the heroes of Dressrosa.

question: Trafalgar Law had earned his Warlord title before the alliance by submitting what grisly offering to the Marines?
correct_answer: The hearts of one hundred pirates
options: The hearts of one hundred pirates
explainer: Law became a Warlord by delivering the hearts of one hundred pirates to the Marines.

question: The undersea kingdom that governs Fish-Man Island, ruled by King Neptune, is known as what?
explainer: The Ryugu Kingdom is the underwater nation of Fish-Man Island ruled by Neptune.

question: Before a ship can safely make the deep-sea dive to Fish-Man Island, what must it obtain at the Sabaody Archipelago?
explainer: A ship needs a resin coating from Sabaody to survive the descent to Fish-Man Island.

question: Which region of Fish-Man Island is a picturesque area famous for its coral formations?
explainer: Coral Hill is the coral-rich district of Fish-Man Island.

question: Where on Fish-Man Island do the mermaids primarily make their home?
explainer: Mermaid Cove is the area of Fish-Man Island where the mermaids live.

question: The climactic battle for the fate of Fish-Man Island against the New Fish-Man Pirates took place in which large public square?
explainer: The final clash for Fish-Man Island unfolded at Gyoncorde Plaza.

question: Where on Fish-Man Island does the giant Sunlight Tree Eve grow, tended by the guardian Den?
explainer: The Sunlight Tree Eve grows in the Sea Forest of Fish-Man Island.

question: What is it that supplies life-giving sunlight to Fish-Man Island despite its location deep beneath the sea?
explainer: The Sunlight Tree Eve channels sunlight down to the deep-sea Fish-Man Island.

question: Hody Jones and the New Fish-Man Pirates based themselves in which impoverished slum of Fish-Man Island?
explainer: The New Fish-Man Pirates operated out of the poverty-stricken Fish-Man District.

question: The World Government officially designates Punk Hazard as what kind of place?
explainer: Punk Hazard is a forbidden off-limits island declared so by the World Government.

question: Dressrosa is a vibrant New World kingdom celebrated as the country of what?
explainer: Dressrosa is famed as a kingdom of love and passion, filled with living toys.

question: Which island beside Dressrosa, home to the Tontatta Tribe, is linked to the mainland by a submerged iron bridge?
explainer: Green Bit, home of the Tontatta Tribe, sits beside Dressrosa across an iron bridge.

question: Luffy spent his two-year timeskip training on which harsh, uninhabited island near the Sabaody Archipelago?
explainer: Luffy trained on the wildlife-filled island of Rusukaina during the timeskip.

question: The Sabaody Archipelago, where the crew regrouped, is a cluster formed from enormous what?
explainer: The Sabaody Archipelago is made up of 79 giant mangrove trees.

question: Fish-Man Island sits at the bottom of the sea directly beneath which colossal landmass?
explainer: Fish-Man Island lies deep beneath the Red Line, the great continent-spanning landmass.

question: The mad scientist Caesar Clown carried a bounty of what amount at the time of the Punk Hazard events?
explainer: Caesar Clown had a bounty of 300,000,000 Berries.

question: Before his Warlord title was stripped, Trafalgar Law's bounty stood at what figure?
explainer: Trafalgar Law's bounty was 440,000,000 Berries.

question: The frozen bounty of Doflamingo, from before he became a Warlord of the Sea, was what amount?
explainer: Doflamingo's pre-Warlord frozen bounty was 340,000,000 Berries.

question: The Luffy-obsessed rookie Bartolomeo entered the Corrida Colosseum carrying a bounty of what amount?
explainer: Bartolomeo carried a bounty of 200,000,000 Berries during the Dressrosa events.

question: The swamp-wielding pirate Caribou, encountered on the way to Fish-Man Island, had a bounty of what amount?
explainer: Caribou had a bounty of 210,000,000 Berries.

question: When the Straw Hats regrouped at Sabaody and headed to Fish-Man Island, Luffy's standing bounty was what figure?
explainer: Luffy's bounty was 400,000,000 Berries after Marineford and through Fish-Man Island.

question: The self-styled 'Pirate Prince' Cavendish arrived at the Corrida Colosseum with a bounty of what amount?
explainer: Cavendish carried a bounty of 280,000,000 Berries at the time of Dressrosa.

question: In a fierce clash of manly pride on the streets of Dressrosa, Franky went one-on-one with and defeated which of Doflamingo officers?
explainer: Franky fought and defeated the baby-costumed officer Señor Pink in Dressrosa.

question: On the elephant island of Zou, the Mink Tribe is protected by two rulers who split their duties by the clock. Who governs during the day while Nekomamushi takes the night?
explainer: Duke Inuarashi is the ruler of Zou's Kurau City by day, while Master Nekomamushi rules by night.

question: Trafalgar Law's ever-present navigator, a talking polar bear, actually hails from the same tribe the Straw Hats meet on Zou. What is his name?
explainer: Bepo, Law's navigator, is a polar bear Mink originally from the Mokomo Dukedom on Zou.

question: The cheerful Mink who joins the Straw Hats' journey toward Whole Cake Island belongs to which animal tribe?
explainer: Carrot is a rabbit Mink from Zou who stows away and accompanies the crew to Totto Land.

question: During the escape from Whole Cake Island, one Mink of the Nox Pirates blew himself up in the Seducing Woods to let the Straw Hats break through. Who made that sacrifice?
explainer: Pedro detonated himself against Charlotte Perospero to open an escape route for the Sanji retrieval team.

question: The Big Mom Pirates envoy who first brings the Straw Hats toward Totto Land, and who is later shot by Bege, is a Mink of which tribe?
explainer: Pekoms is a lion Mink and a combatant of the Big Mom Pirates.

question: Big Mom's beloved caretaker, whose photo she treasures, was publicly revered as a saint but was secretly running a business selling children to the World Government. Who was she?
explainer: Mother Carmel posed as the 'Holy Mother' but was a child trafficker who supplied recruits to the Marines.

question: Big Mom's elderly head chef, an original member of the Big Mom Pirates, prepared the very first Whole Cake Island. Who is he?
explainer: Streusen is the Big Mom Pirates' head chef whose Cook-Cook Fruit lets him turn objects into food.

question: Among Big Mom's three elite Sweet Commanders, which son handed Luffy a grueling defeat before their rematch in the Mirro-World?
explainer: Charlotte Katakuri, a Sweet Commander and Big Mom's second son, fought Luffy in a lengthy duel.

question: Capone Bege's wife, who helps bake the wedding cake that soothes Big Mom's rampage, is one of the Charlotte daughters. Who is she?
explainer: Charlotte Chiffon, Lola's twin, married Capone Bege and helped Sanji bake the calming cake.

question: One of Big Mom's daughters is a mermaid married to Aladine, a former officer of the Sun Pirates. Which daughter?
explainer: Charlotte Praline is a mermaid and the wife of Aladine, formerly of the Sun Pirates.

question: Sanji's only sister among the Vinsmoke siblings, who can neutralize poisons within her own body, carries which fighting epithet?
explainer: Vinsmoke Reiju fights as 'Poison Pink' of Germa 66 and can absorb poison.

question: Sanji's father, the cold commander who genetically engineered his children, rules which militaristic kingdom?
explainer: Vinsmoke Judge is king of the Germa Kingdom and leader of the Germa 66 army.

question: Among Sanji's brothers, which Vinsmoke sibling fights under the codename 'Sparking Red'?
explainer: Vinsmoke Ichiji is the eldest brother, known as 'Sparking Red' of Germa 66.

question: The gentle old man cast out and hunted by Big Mom, revealed to be the father of Lola and Chiffon, is named what?
explainer: Pound is a former husband of Big Mom and the father of Lola and Chiffon.

question: The Straw Hats once met a Charlotte daughter on Thriller Bark who had fled Totto Land to avoid an arranged political marriage. Who was she?
explainer: Lola ran away from a marriage to the Giant Prince Loki and later gave Nami a Vivre Card leading to her mother.

question: After Kaido's defeat, who takes the seat as the new Shogun of Wano Country?
explainer: Kozuki Momonosuke becomes the new Shogun of Wano following the liberation of the country.

question: Wano's most celebrated courtesan, the oiran Komurasaki, was secretly living a hidden identity. Who was she really?
explainer: Komurasaki the oiran was Kozuki Hiyori, Oden's daughter and Momonosuke's younger sister, in disguise.

question: The kind old swordsmith 'Tenguyama Hitetsu' who cares for Otama in Kuri is secretly a former ruler of Wano. Who is he?
explainer: Tenguyama Hitetsu is Kozuki Sukiyaki, Oden's father and the former Shogun of Wano, still alive in secret.

question: The feared yakuza boss Kyoshiro, who seemingly kills Komurasaki, is revealed to be one of Oden's loyal retainers in disguise. Which one?
explainer: Kyoshiro was Denjiro, a Red Scabbard who spent 20 years undercover as a yakuza boss.

question: In the Udon prison mine, which former yakuza legend mentors Luffy in mastering advanced Armament Haki?
explainer: Hyogoro the Flower teaches Luffy to emit Haki (Ryuo) from his body during their imprisonment in Udon.

question: The beloved old man of Ebisu Town known as 'Tonoyasu,' who is publicly executed by Orochi, was once the daimyo of which region?
explainer: Shimotsuki Yasuie, 'Tonoyasu,' was the former daimyo of Hakumai before Orochi's rise.

question: Which Red Scabbard is a fish-man known as 'the Kappa' who protected the young Hiyori for years after Oden's death?
explainer: Kawamatsu the Kappa is a fish-man retainer of Oden who sheltered Hiyori during Wano's dark years.

question: Which Red Scabbard spent the time-skip as the mountain bandit chief of the Atamayama Thieves before rejoining the cause?
explainer: Ashura Doji led the Atamayama Thieves as 'Shutenmaru' before rejoining the Kozuki cause.

question: During the Onigashima raid, which samurai retainer loses an arm to a blow from Kaido himself?
explainer: Kikunojo (Kiku) has her left arm cut off by Kaido during the raid on Onigashima.

question: The perpetually smiling little girl of Ebisu, daughter of the executed Yasuie, is named what?
explainer: O-Toko is Yasuie's daughter; she cannot stop laughing after eating a defective SMILE fruit.

question: The young girl Luffy befriends in Kuri can win the loyalty of beasts, and even Kaido's Gifters, using what she makes with her ability?
explainer: O-Tama's Kibi Kibi no Mi lets her make dango that tame animals and override the loyalty of SMILE users.

question: The nine-tailed fox who guards the Oihagi Bridge in Ringo, robbing swordsmen under the name 'Gyukimaru,' is called what?
explainer: Onimaru is Ashura Doji's old fox companion who took the identity 'Gyukimaru' to guard the graves in Ringo.

question: Who leads the Orochi Oniwabanshu, the ninja force serving the Shogun of Wano?
explainer: Fukurokuju is the long-headed leader of Orochi's Oniwabanshu ninja squad.

question: Kaido of the Beasts Pirates is widely called by which title reflecting his reputation on land, sea, and air?
explainer: Kaido is renowned as the 'Strongest Creature in the World.'

question: Among Kaido's three All-Stars, which one serves as his right hand and carries the epithet 'the Wildfire'?
explainer: King the Wildfire is Kaido's right-hand man and the strongest of the three All-Stars.

question: Who holds the title of Shogun of Wano throughout most of the arc, ruling as Kaido's corrupt puppet?
explainer: Kurozumi Orochi seized the Shogun title with Kaido's backing after betraying the Kozuki.

question: The cyborg All-Star Queen, who unleashes the Ice Oni plague on the Udon prisoners, was formerly a scientist of which research group?
explainer: Queen was once a scientist in Vegapunk's old research team MADS and created the Ice Oni virus.

question: The Tobiroppo member Who's-Who, who fights Jinbe, was once an agent of which World Government organization?
explainer: Who's-Who is a former CP9 agent who once guarded the Gum-Gum Fruit before it was stolen.

question: The dinosaur-Zoan Tobiroppo members Ulti and Page One share what family relationship?
explainer: Ulti and Page One are brother and sister within the Tobiroppo of the Beasts Pirates.

question: The Beasts Pirates headliner X Drake is secretly a Marine, leading which covert unit?
explainer: X Drake is an undercover Marine and the captain of the secret unit SWORD.

question: Eustass Kid's first mate Killer was forced to eat a defective SMILE, leaving him unable to stop laughing and operating under what assassin alias?
explainer: Killer ate a failed SMILE fruit and was made to serve as the executioner 'Kamazo the Manslayer.'

question: Which former Whitebeard Pirates commander, a phoenix-Zoan user, arrives to reinforce the alliance during the Onigashima raid?
explainer: Marco 'the Phoenix' joins the raid on Onigashima to honor Oden's and Ace's legacy.

question: Which member of Oden's Red Scabbards was also a commander of the Whitebeard Pirates and dies during the Onigashima raid?
explainer: Izo, Kikunojo's brother, was the 16th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates and dies at Onigashima.

question: The master swordsmith who forged Oden's blade Enma and Zoro's Wado Ichimonji was an emigrant from Wano and the grandfather of Kuina. Who was he?
explainer: Shimotsuki Kozaburo, who fled Wano and settled in the East Blue, forged both Enma and Wado Ichimonji.

question: Who leads the Nine Red Scabbards, disguising himself early on with a Devil Fruit that lets him conjure clothing from thin air?
explainer: Kin'emon leads the Nine Red Scabbards and can produce disguises with his Cloth-Cloth Fruit.

question: The pirate 'Roar of the Sea' Scratchmen Apoo appeared as Kid's ally, but was secretly working for whom the whole time?
explainer: Apoo had already joined the Beasts Pirates and betrayed the Kid-Hawkins alliance to Kaido.

question: In the aftermath of the Reverie, the World Government reported which flame-wielding Revolutionary chief of staff as killed at Mary Geoise?
explainer: Sabo was reported dead after the events at Mary Geoise, a rumor that shook the Revolutionary Army.

question: Which former Drum Kingdom tyrant, now a wealthy monarch again, attends the Reverie as a king?
explainer: Wapol returns as king of the Black Drum Kingdom, having grown rich, and attends the Reverie.

question: The giant Fish-Man Island princess who attends the Reverie is secretly the reincarnation of which ancient weapon?
explainer: Princess Shirahoshi is the current incarnation of the Ancient Weapon Poseidon.

question: Which Alabasta princess travels to Mary Geoise for the Reverie alongside her father, King Cobra?
explainer: Nefertari Vivi attends the Reverie with her father Cobra, reuniting briefly with old friends.

question: At Mary Geoise during the Reverie, Sabo is shocked to discover which former Warlord being used as a mindless slave?
explainer: Bartholomew Kuma, stripped of his will, was kept as a slave at Mary Geoise where Sabo found him.

question: The Reverie reveals a hidden figure who secretly rules the World Government from atop the Empty Throne. What is this ruler's name?
explainer: Im is the secret sovereign who sits upon the Empty Throne, above even the Five Elders.

question: On Egghead Island, the genius Dr. Vegapunk operates through six separate bodies. What are these bodies collectively called?
explainer: Vegapunk split himself into six 'Satellites,' each embodying one of his personality traits.

question: The Supernova Jewelry Bonney is revealed on Egghead to be the daughter of which man?
explainer: Jewelry Bonney is the daughter of Bartholomew Kuma, who sacrificed everything for her.

question: Which Five Elder, titled the 'Warrior God of Science and Defense,' personally leads the assault on Egghead Island?
explainer: Saint Jaygarcia Saturn, the Warrior God of Science and Defense, arrives on Egghead to oversee the operation.

question: Which axe-wielding Marine, once Vegapunk's bodyguard, is stationed on Egghead Island?
explainer: Sentomaru serves as the commander of Vegapunk's guards on Egghead Island.

question: On Egghead, one of Vegapunk's six satellites betrays the others and sides with the World Government. Which satellite is the traitor?
explainer: The satellite York, representing Vegapunk's greed, betrays the others to seek Celestial Dragon status.

question: Bartholomew Kuma belongs to a race persecuted by the World Government and once ruled which kingdom as its king?
explainer: Kuma, a member of the persecuted Buccaneer race, was once the king of the Sorbet Kingdom.

question: In Ringo's graveyard, Zoro receives one of Oden's two great swords from Hiyori. What is that black blade called?
explainer: Hiyori gives Zoro the sword Enma, one of Oden's blades, in exchange for the returned Shusui.

question: The traitor among Oden's retainers used his Devil Fruit to draw a decoy while abducting the real heir. Whom did he kidnap?
explainer: Kanjuro drew a fake Momonosuke as a distraction and carried off the real Momonosuke to Onigashima.

question: The straw-voodoo pirate Basil Hawkins spent the Wano arc working as a subordinate of which Emperor?
explainer: Basil Hawkins allied himself with Kaido and served the Beasts Pirates during the Wano arc.

question: The Sweet Commander Charlotte Cracker builds armies of biscuit soldiers thanks to which Devil Fruit?
explainer: Cracker's Bis Bis no Mi lets him generate and control biscuits, forming durable soldier constructs.

question: Big Mom's eldest son Perospero can produce and manipulate candy at will. Which Devil Fruit grants this?
explainer: Perospero's Pero Pero no Mi allows him to create and shape candy.

question: The Sweet Commander Charlotte Smoothie can wring liquid out of objects and living things. Which Devil Fruit does she wield?
explainer: Smoothie's Shibo Shibo no Mi lets her squeeze liquids out of anything, including people.

question: Charlotte Brûlée traps enemies inside a strange dimension accessed through reflective surfaces. Which Devil Fruit is responsible?
explainer: Brûlée's Mira Mira no Mi creates mirrors and grants access to the Mirro-World.

question: Charlotte Oven can superheat anything he touches, even boiling the sea. Which Devil Fruit gives him this power?
explainer: Oven's Netsu Netsu no Mi allows him to generate and transfer intense heat.

question: Charlotte Daifuku summons a powerful genie by rubbing his own body. Which Devil Fruit produces this genie?
explainer: Daifuku's Hoya Hoya no Mi summons a fighting genie when he rubs his stomach.

question: The Big Mom Pirates' Charlotte Mont-d'Or can trap people and objects inside books. Which Devil Fruit does this?
explainer: Mont-d'Or's Buku Buku no Mi lets him control books and imprison things within their pages.

question: Big Mom did not always possess her soul-manipulating Devil Fruit. From whom did she originally obtain it as a child?
explainer: Big Mom gained the Soru Soru no Mi from Mother Carmel, who vanished the day Linlin's power awakened.

question: Basil Hawkins uses straw voodoo dolls to redirect damage onto others. Which Devil Fruit grants this power?
explainer: Hawkins's Wara Wara no Mi lets him manipulate straw and transfer damage through voodoo effigies.

question: Yamato transforms into a legendary wolf-like guardian deity of Wano. Which Mythical Zoan fruit was eaten?
correct_answer: Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Okuchi no Makami
incorrect_answers: Neko Neko no Mi, Model: Saber Tiger
